data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Urges Swift Passage of Clarity Act for Crypto Regulation
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has urged Congress to expedite the passage of the Clarity Act, aimed at establishing federal regulations for the cryptocurrency market. According to NS3.AI, Bessent emphasized the importance of reducing market volatility through clear regulatory frameworks. He noted the bipartisan support for the legislation but cautioned that progress might stall if Democrats regain control of the House. The discussions surrounding the Clarity Act also addressed issues related to crypto market structure, regulatory clarity, tax treatment, and concerns over bank deposit volatility.

data.title: Industrial Economy Shows Signs of Recovery Amid Consumer Goods Weakness
data.description: The industrial economy is experiencing a rebound, although consumer-facing goods remain a weak area. Bloomberg posted on X that some CEOs are hesitant to predict when a recovery in this sector might occur. Despite improvements in other areas, the uncertainty surrounding consumer goods continues to pose challenges for industry leaders.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,000 USDT with a 1.14% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2026, 15:03 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,000.02002 USDT, with a narrowed 1.14% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 68,000 USDT with a 0.73% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2026, 15:03 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 68,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 68,063.617188 USDT, with a narrowed 0.73% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Glassnode: BTC options indicate increased defensive sentiment in the market and a greater demand for downside protection.
data.description: Analysis released by Glassnode on its X platform shows that Bitcoin has recently been consolidating in the $65,000 to $73,000 range, but the options market has shown defensive characteristics. BTC options open interest (OI) has rebounded from 255,000 BTC on December 26th to 452,000 BTC, approaching the highs seen at the end of Q4 2025. The 1-month and 3-month implied volatility have increased by approximately 10 volatility points, indicating that traders anticipate potentially significant price volatility in the future. Put option deviation has risen from 6% to 18% within a month, highlighting the market's willingness to pay for downside protection. However, the current market liquidity structure is trending towards equilibrium. Since Bitcoin's drop from $82,000, bearish buying has dominated; bullish activity has increased over the past two days, causing the put/call ratio to fall back to 0.7, indicating that short-term positions are stabilizing, but short-term implied volatility is lower than actual volatility.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 5,042 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 73,075 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 5,042 BTC, compared to a net outflow of 826 BTC over the past 7 days; the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 73,075 ETH, compared to a net outflow of 123,376 ETH over the past 7 days; and the Solana ETF saw a net inflow of 19,170 SOL, compared to a net outflow of 21,724 SOL over the past 7 days.

data.title: Quantum Computing Firm Infleqtion Set for Public Debut After Shareholder Approval
data.description: Shareholders have given the green light for the merger of Infleqtion, a quantum computing company, with a blank-check vehicle, paving the way for its public debut. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move could lead to more companies in the sector going public, increasing the pressure on them to demonstrate advancements in quantum technology. The approval marks a significant step for Infleqtion as it seeks to capitalize on growing interest in quantum computing and its potential applications. The sector is under scrutiny to prove that its technology is nearing maturity, which could influence investor confidence and market dynamics.

data.title: Ilia Malinin Aims for Individual Gold in Men's Free Skate
data.description: Ilia Malinin, known as the 'Quad God,' is set to compete for individual gold in the men's free skate event. New York Times posted on X, highlighting Malinin's previous contribution to Team USA's gold medal victory. Fans can watch his performance today as he aims to secure another gold medal for the team.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Leadership Change: Tomasz Stańczak to Step Down
data.description: Tomasz Stańczak, Co-Executive Director of the Ethereum Foundation, is set to resign from his position at the end of February. According to NS3.AI, Bastian Aue will take over the leadership role alongside Hsiao-Wei. Despite stepping down, Stańczak intends to stay involved as a core developer, concentrating on product development and Ethereum governance.

data.title: Bitcoin Enters Prolonged Capitulation Phase
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X that Bitcoin ($BTC) has entered a time-based capitulation zone. According to Ted, this phase may last between five to nine months before a new uptrend begins. The current market conditions suggest a period of extended consolidation, which could precede a potential recovery in Bitcoin's value. Investors are advised to monitor the situation closely as the market navigates through this challenging phase.

data.title: Schonfeld Strategic Advisors Appoints New Commodities Trading Head
data.description: Schonfeld Strategic Advisors, a prominent multistrategy hedge fund, has appointed Arthur Goossens as its new head of commodities trading. Bloomberg posted on X that Goossens previously served as the co-head of commodities trading at BNP Paribas. This strategic move is part of Schonfeld's efforts to strengthen its commodities trading division. Goossens brings extensive experience from his tenure at BNP Paribas, where he played a crucial role in managing and expanding the bank's commodities trading operations. His appointment is expected to enhance Schonfeld's capabilities in navigating the complex commodities market.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Discussions on Europe's Nuclear Future Between Germany and France
data.description: Chancellor Friedrich Merz announced ongoing discussions with French President Emmanuel Macron regarding the future of Europe's nuclear weapons. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic importance of these talks amid shifting geopolitical landscapes. The dialogue between Germany and France underscores the need for a cohesive European defense strategy, particularly in the context of nuclear capabilities. Both leaders are exploring options to ensure the security and stability of the region, while addressing concerns related to nuclear proliferation and defense policies. This collaboration reflects a broader effort to strengthen European unity and address global security challenges.

data.title: A whale deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid to open long positions in ETH and SOL.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid to open 20x leveraged long positions in ETH and SOL.

data.title: Gold and silver prices rose, while cryptocurrency volatility indices fell, with both the BVIX and EVIX experiencing intraday declines of over 2%.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $5,006.79 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.60%. Silver prices rose to $78.497 per ounce, a daily increase of 4.51%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 51.71, a daily decrease of 4.51%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 69.50, a daily decrease of 2.67%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.06% to 6.90118. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.14% to 152.918. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 0.27% to $62.76 per barrel. Brent crude oil rose 0.01% to $67.89 per barrel. Gate allows users to trade traditional financial market products directly within the platform, providing a one-stop solution for various asset classes including precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration between crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi functionality is fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to conveniently participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities beyond the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: State Street: Continued disinflationary trend will pave the way for a Fed rate cut later this year
data.description: Michael Metcalfe, head of macro strategy at State Street, commented on the US CPI data, noting that the important conclusion for the interest rate market and the stock market is that the disinflationary trend continues. This further confirms the view that we have passed the peak of inflation concerns. It paints a picture of a continued improvement in the inflation outlook, paving the way for interest rate cuts later this year. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve to Appoint Randall Guynn as Director of Regulation and Supervision
data.description: The Federal Reserve is expected to appoint veteran Wall Street banking attorney Randall Guynn as the Director of Regulation and Supervision. According to Odaily, sources have indicated that Guynn's extensive experience in the banking sector positions him as a suitable candidate for this role. His appointment is anticipated to bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the regulatory framework of the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Uniswap and Bitcoin Cash Lead Gains in CoinDesk 20 Index
data.description: Uniswap (UNI) experienced a 5.4% increase, emerging as the leading gainer in the CoinDesk 20 index. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin Cash (BCH) also saw a rise of 5.3%, positioning itself alongside UNI as one of the top performers. These upward movements contributed to the overall index's positive performance during the trading day.

data.title: Ripple CEO Joins CFTC Innovation Advisory Committee Amid Regulatory Developments
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has been appointed to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission's (CFTC) Innovation Advisory Committee, signaling a positive regulatory development for XRP. According to NS3.AI, this appointment may help alleviate long-term legal uncertainties surrounding the cryptocurrency.

Despite experiencing moderate selling pressure and slight price weakness, XRP's current distribution is less intense compared to pre-2022 bear market levels. Technical analysis indicates that XRP has support near $1.27, with resistance expected between $1.78 and $1.80. This suggests cautious optimism for recovery if these key price levels are maintained.

data.title: Bitcoin mining company IREN will be included in the MSCI US Index.
data.description: Bitcoin mining company IREN Limited announced it will be included in the MSCI US Index after the market closes on February 27. This follows Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) as another crypto-related company entering the index. Previously, index provider MSCI considered removing digital asset treasury (DAT) companies with more than 50% of their balance sheets allocated to cryptocurrencies from its major stock indices, but ultimately decided not to exclude such companies. Strategy had opposed the proposal in December 2025, calling it "discriminatory, arbitrary, and unworkable." The MSCI US Index tracks large and mid-cap stocks in the US stock market, representing approximately 85% of the free-float adjusted market capitalization. Inclusion in the index can attract passive fund inflows and increase a company's visibility among institutional investors. (Thestreet)

data.title: Tomasz Stańczak, co-executive director of the Ethereum Foundation, plans to step down at the end of February.
data.description: Tomasz Stańczak, co-executive director of the Ethereum Foundation, announced that he will step down at the end of February. Bastian Aue will serve as co-executive director with Hsiao-Wei. He said he will continue to help companies build businesses on Ethereum, while playing a more core developer role, personally building products, and participating in the development and governance of smart agents.
